mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.collection_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, collection_id, collection_name, slug, type, image_url, featured, active, product_count ) SELECT col.id, col.tenant, NOW(), col.id, col.name, col.slug, col.type, col.image_url, col.featured, col.active, COALESCE(col.product_count, 0) FROM hm_catalog.collections col

INSERT INTO hm_query.product_tag_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_id, tag ) SELECT cit.id, 'homebase', NOW(), ci.product_id, cit.tag FROM hm_catalog.catalog_item_tags cit JOIN hm_catalog.catalog_items ci ON ci.id = cit.catalog_item_id
